title: podman quadlet list fails with templated service
body:
### Issue Description

I template a Django service as per [the docs](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html#template-files).
Here's a partial list of quadlet files:

```
.rw-r--r--@  441 josh 17 Aug 21:34 mp-django@.container
drwxr-xr-x@    - josh 27 Aug 15:46 mp-django@.container.d
lrwxrwxrwx@    - josh  2 Sep 08:42 mp-django@collectstatic.container -> mp-django@.container
drwxr-xr-x@    - josh 27 Aug 15:46 mp-django@collectstatic.container.d
lrwxrwxrwx@    - josh  2 Sep 08:42 mp-django@migrate.container -> mp-django@.container
```

This raises an error on `podman quadlet list`



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a templated container service
2. Run `podman quadlet list`


### Describe the results you received

```
❯ podman quadlet list
Error: querying systemd for unit status: Unit name mp-django@.service is missing the instance name.
```

### Describe the results you expected

Expected the command to disregard template files

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: We should try and get this fixed before 5.7
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Ran into this in 5.8.0 today. Quick reminder that this is still a problem. Thanks all.
